headline: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Valuation Check After Recent Weak Share Price Momentum
summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) has drawn fresh attention after a period of weaker recent share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months despite a positive 1 year total return. See our latest analysis for Cadence Design Systems. At a share price of $287.03, Cadence Design Systems has seen weaker recent momentum, with its 90 day share price return of 10.17% contrasting with a 12.51% 1 year total shareholder return. This points to fading...

headline: NVIDIA and Global Industrial Software Giants Bring Design, Engineering and Manufacturing Into the AI Era
summary: NVIDIA and Industrial Software Giants Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, PTC, Siemens and Synopsys are bringing NVIDIA CUDA-X, Omniverse and GPU-accelerated industrial software and tools to their customers to accelerate design, engineering and manufacturing. headline: Cadence and NVIDIA Unveil Accelerated Engineering Solutions Purpose-Built for Agentic AI Chip and System Design​
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026--Today, Cadence announced an expansion of its broad collaboration with NVIDIA to accelerate Cadence’s Design for AI and AI for Design strategy. The next generation of agentic AI design solutions includes autonomous, long-running agents that require accelerated, trusted, physics-grounded engines to translate design intent into automated flows, generate designs and debug errors, and manage long, complex, end-to-end workflows. Cadence’s leadership in agentic AI is e
